notes: v2.4.17 — Purchasing PO editing + export overhaul, Rapid Prototyping queue improvements, AS9100/IMS in-place editing, and a Travelers approval override. Purchasing: edit the vendor, project, build (including MTF and Project-Wide), department, payment terms and shipping right on a purchase order with one-click dropdowns; open vendor portal/website links from the PO; large prices display in full; and the PO export (PDF and Word) now shows correct prices on ordered POs, includes the Build and vendor Notes, and has a cleaner branded look with a rebuilt Word document. Rapid Prototyping: new parts appear reliably, retired machines are off the board, the 380mc Left and Right are separate lanes, finished/failed/cancelled cards auto-clear, one consistent status menu everywhere, per-part material usage, an open-folder shortcut, a cost-by-project view, opt-in auto-deduct of material from inventory, and a new admin Settings page. AS9100/IMS: edit single fields in place, a cleaner item view, and accurate catalog counts. Travelers: Override and Approve when no second reviewer is available (reason recorded). Inventory: correct a stock item's part number via a catalog picker, plus a search-as-you-type catalog picker when entering requisitions. Operations Intelligence: long-running active projects stay visible by default.
